narrative: Strait of Hormuz tensions and crude prices above $94.9 may sustain AUD, CAD, and NOK into the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1726; ECB hold on April 30 removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY watch: BoJ meeting on April 28; any hawkish surprise would pressure USD/JPY from Friday's 159.33 close.
